configReference.heading: Configuration reference
configReference.intro: All settings below are configured via environment variables or a .env file. They are shown here for reference — to change a value, edit the file shown in each row.

pipeline.intro: Read-only view of the models Bristlenose currently uses for each pipeline stage. To change a backend, edit your settings (env vars or .env file).
